---
title: Shiny at posit::conf(2025)
description: "Find Shiny talks and workshops at posit::conf(2025) in Atlanta."
auto-description: true
subtitle: Atlanta, GA (September 2025)
people:
  - Shiny Team
date: '2025-09-12'
image: shiny-team.jpg
image-alt: Shiny team photo from SciPy 2025
listing:
  - id: talks
    template: talks.ejs
    contents: talks.yml
ported_from: shiny
port_status: in-progress
software: ["shiny-python", "shiny-r"]
languages: ["R", "Python"]
categories:
  - Interactive Apps
tags:
  - Shiny
---

::: {lead}
There are many talks and workshops about Shiny by the community and Shiny team at posit::conf(2025).
We'd love to chat and say hello!
:::

## Talks by Posit Folks

::: {#talks}
:::
